name: python3-pydantic
title: python3-pydantic
summary: Data validation and settings management using Python type hinting
description:
Data validation and settings management using Python type hinting
pydantic uses type hinting (PEP 484) and variable annotation (PEP 526) to
validate that untrusted data takes the desired form. There is also support for
an extension to dataclasses where the input data is validated.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pydantic because Data validation and settings management using Python type hinting.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pydantic as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pydantic with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pydantic --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
